text.title: Strategy Analysis — Future State — Decision Tree
text.summary: Routing tree mapping observable signals to a rule from 01-core-rules.xml.

decision-tree.root-question: Is the business-need spec current and is the approver identifiable?

branch.when: need_spec_current AND approver_named == true AND existing_spec_age < 90d

example.trace: ENG-42 → need spec current → approver=COO → produce new future-state spec
